items.title: ruvnet/wifi-densepose
items.summary: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

items.title: moeru-ai/airi
items.summary: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

items.title: ruvnet/ruflo
items.summary: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

items.title: alibaba/OpenSandbox
items.summary: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

items.title: microsoft/markitdown
items.summary: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

items.title: K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills
items.summary: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

items.title: superset-sh/superset
items.summary: IDE for the AI Agents Era - Run an army of Claude Code, Codex, etc. on your machine

items.title: servo/servo
items.summary: Servo aims to empower developers with a lightweight, high-performance alternative for embedding web technologies in applications.
